title: Grilled Nectarine Yakitori
description: A Japanese-inspired grilled chicken dish featuring sweet and tangy nectarine skewers. This recipe combines the flavors of Japan with the freshness of nectarine.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together tangy sauce, sweet soy sauce, saudi sesame oil, and arabian allspice.
Cut chicken breast into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush nectarine slices with the tangy sauce mixture and thread onto skewers.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until chicken is cooked through and nectarine is tender.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional nectarine slices and tangy sauce if desired.
